title: Maryland Disability Claims Examiner Scheduled Salary Rates (DBM Standard Salary Schedule, eff 2025-07-01)
description: Machine-readable Maryland DBM Standard Salary Schedule grades 14 and 19, giving the full 24-step (steps 5–28) annual progression for each. Grade 14 maps to class 5260 Disability Claims Examiner I ($62,220–$96,790); Grade 19 maps to class 5263 Disability Claims Examiner Supervisor ($85,963–$133,951). Extracted from the DBM standard-scale PDF (extraction_status complete).

columns.name: grades.<grade>.steps.<step>
columns.description: Annual salary at the given step (5–28) within the grade.

columns.name: grades.<grade>.maps_to_class
columns.description: Class code and title the grade maps to (5260 Examiner I / 5263 Examiner Supervisor).

source.publisher: Maryland Department of Budget and Management (DBM); MSDE/DORS Disability Determination Services Branch
source.title: Maryland Standard Salary Schedule effective 2025-07-01 (FY2026)

notes: Authoritative: full 24-step annual step grids for grades 14 and 19 parsed from the official DBM Standard Salary Schedule PDF; step basis is annual. AFSCME representation; the supervisor (5263) is in AFSCME Maryland Supervisors Union (Unit S). FY2026 schedule (eff 2025-07-01).
